---
title: "Beispielliste"
author: "Bernd Gruber"
date: "2025-11-02"
output:
  word_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Liste aller Beispiele fuer das Ulmerbuch 

|bsp   |name                          |rmd |pdf |link |
|:-----|:-----------------------------|:---|:---|:----|
|4.1   |Occupancy_Koalas              |Yes |Yes |[link](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/green-striped-gecko/UlmerBuch/refs/heads/main/inst/extdata/bsp_4.1_Occupancy_Koalas.pdf)|
|4.2   |Erdkroete                     |Yes |Yes |[link](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/green-striped-gecko/UlmerBuch/refs/heads/main/inst/extdata/bsp_4.2_Erdkroete.pdf)|
|4.3   |benoetigte-Erfassungen        |Yes |Yes |[link](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/green-striped-gecko/UlmerBuch/refs/heads/main/inst/extdata/bsp_4.3_benoetigte-Erfassungen.pdf)|
|4.5   |benoetigte-Erfassungen_2      |Yes |Yes |[link](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/green-striped-gecko/UlmerBuch/refs/heads/main/inst/extdata/bsp_4.5_benoetigte-Erfassungen_2.pdf)|
|5.6   |Froschindex                   |Yes |Yes |[link](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/green-striped-gecko/UlmerBuch/refs/heads/main/inst/extdata/bsp_5.6_Froschindex.pdf)|
|6.1   |Totalerfassung                |Yes |Yes |[link](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/green-striped-gecko/UlmerBuch/refs/heads/main/inst/extdata/bsp_6.1_Totalerfassung.pdf)|
|6.7   |Removal                       |Yes |Yes |[link](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/green-striped-gecko/UlmerBuch/refs/heads/main/inst/extdata/bsp_6.7_Removal.pdf)|
|7.3   |Mayfield                      |Yes |Yes |[link](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/green-striped-gecko/UlmerBuch/refs/heads/main/inst/extdata/bsp_7.3_Mayfield.pdf)|
|7.5   |KaplanMaier_Cox               |Yes |Yes |[link](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/green-striped-gecko/UlmerBuch/refs/heads/main/inst/extdata/bsp_7.5_KaplanMaier_Cox.pdf)|
|8.1   |Mann_Loeffler                 |Yes |Yes |[link](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/green-striped-gecko/UlmerBuch/refs/heads/main/inst/extdata/bsp_8.1_Mann_Loeffler.pdf)|
|8.2   |Mann_Amphibien                |Yes |Yes |[link](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/green-striped-gecko/UlmerBuch/refs/heads/main/inst/extdata/bsp_8.2_Mann_Amphibien.pdf)|
|8.4   |BACI                          |Yes |Yes |[link](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/green-striped-gecko/UlmerBuch/refs/heads/main/inst/extdata/bsp_8.4_BACI.pdf)|
|8.5   |Regression                    |Yes |Yes |[link](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/green-striped-gecko/UlmerBuch/refs/heads/main/inst/extdata/bsp_8.5_Regression.pdf)|
|8.7   |State-Space                   |Yes |Yes |[link](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/green-striped-gecko/UlmerBuch/refs/heads/main/inst/extdata/bsp_8.7_State-Space.pdf)|
|9.1   |closure-test                  |Yes |Yes |[link](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/green-striped-gecko/UlmerBuch/refs/heads/main/inst/extdata/bsp_9.1_closure-test.pdf)|
|9.2   |Modellselektion               |Yes |Yes |[link](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/green-striped-gecko/UlmerBuch/refs/heads/main/inst/extdata/bsp_9.2_Modellselektion.pdf)|
|10.13 |Populationsgroessenschaetzung |Yes |Yes |[link](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/green-striped-gecko/UlmerBuch/refs/heads/main/inst/extdata/bsp_10.13_Populationsgroessenschaetzung.pdf)|
|10.5  |Fangfrequenzen                |Yes |Yes |[link](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/green-striped-gecko/UlmerBuch/refs/heads/main/inst/extdata/bsp_10.5_Fangfrequenzen.pdf)|
|11.11 |Ringmeldungen                 |Yes |Yes |[link](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/green-striped-gecko/UlmerBuch/refs/heads/main/inst/extdata/bsp_11.11_Ringmeldungen.pdf)|
|11.6  |JS                            |Yes |Yes |[link](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/green-striped-gecko/UlmerBuch/refs/heads/main/inst/extdata/bsp_11.6_JS.pdf)|
